steps.t: Halbarad is at the stables of Rivendell. Candaith has asked you to speak with Halbarad to see if he has any final words before you join the rest of th…
The Grey Company begins its ride south. Halbarad has determined that the Rangers will rest at Gwingris, in Eregion. You should ride south to Gwingris,…
Londan should still be in Eregion. He left Gwingris heading east. Saeradan has asked you to find the farrier Londan and convince him to return to Gwin…
Londan the farrier will be waiting for you back at Gwingris, in Eregion. You have rescued Londan from the Sharkúnakh uruks that he encountered and sho…
Saeradan is at Gwingris, in Eregion. The farrier Londan has thanked you for your aid, and he has asked you to speak with Saeradan.
